mapper.sql: id, user_id, course_id, path_id, `status`, score, completed_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_learning_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId}
SELECT FROM user_learning_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND path_id = #{pathId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_learning_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND path_id = #{pathId} AND `status` = 'COMPLETED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_learning_progress (user_id, course_id, path_id, `status`, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{courseId}, #{pathId}, 'IN_PROGRESS', #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
